def: A genus of crustaceans, containing the crawfish of fresh-waterlobster of Europe, and allied species of western North America. SeeCrawfish.
The state of being widowed or bereaved; loss; bereavement. [R.]
The act or process of depurating or freeing from foreign orimpure matter, as a liquid or wound.
A portion of the Old Testament prepared by Origen in the 3dcentury, containing the Hebrew text and seven Greek versions of it,arranged in eight parallel columns.
Foreign; belonging to, or coming from, abroad.
The time of the first appearance of light in the morning.
One who, or that which, slices; specifically, the circular sawof the lapidary.
Harm; ruin; also, reproach; disgrace. [Obs.] Chaucer.
Having floral ornaments; as, floriated capitals of Gothicpillars.
Of or pertaining to brine, or to the sea; partaking of thenature of brine; salt; as, a briny taste; the briny flood.
